recommendations.title: Winter Sleep
recommendations.overview: Aydın is a hotel owner and a retired actor in rural Turkey. As winter emerges he begins navigating the conflicts within the relationships with his wife, sister and existence.

recommendations.title: Three Monkeys

recommendations.title: The Small Town
recommendations.overview: A story in four parts is told from the perspective of two children, showing life in school, in nature, with family and at home. All of this unfolding along with the seasons. The Small Town depicts life in the village, while also portraying the relati

recommendations.title: Mustang
recommendations.overview: In a Turkish village, five orphaned sisters live under strict rule while members of their family prepare their arranged marriages.

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Bad Lieutenant
recommendations.overview: While investigating a young nun's rape, a corrupt New York City police detective, with a serious drug and gambling addiction, tries to change his ways and find forgiveness.
